items.rationale: Sees an early, fast-emerging interplay between crypto and AI; explicitly endorsed efforts to decentralize AI infrastructure.
items.age_note: Theme stated 2023-04-05 and reinforced 2023-08-25, so current and consistent.

citations.quote: We're in the early innings of some fascinating interplay between crypto+AI/ML
complement each other well as you work to decentralize AI

items.rationale: Repeatedly enthusiastic about cryptographic proving breakthroughs (Lasso/Jolt, zkSync) as foundational tech web3 builders will deploy.
items.age_note: Most recent mention 2023-09-08; reinforced by 2023-08-10 and 2023-02-16 — sustained, escalating interest.

citations.quote: Get ready for some mind blowing improvements in SNARK performance with the release of Lasso & Jolt.
Such a good way to appreciate the beauty and significance ZKPs!

items.rationale: Personally plays and praises crypto-native games; led/celebrated seed and ecosystem deals, citing founders who 'see around corners'.
items.age_note: Most recent 2023-09-21 (Proof of Play); earlier 2023-04-28 (Yuga/Otherside) — recent and growing conviction.

citations.quote: Playing @PirateNationNFT over the last few months has been a delight... Delighted that @a16zcrypto is leading the @ProofOfPlay seed round!
Very excited to see what you are all going to build together.

items.rationale: a16z crypto led Sound.xyz Series A; he is energized by the founder's vision for on-chain music distribution.

citations.quote: Hugely excited that @a16zcrypto is leading the @soundxyz_ Series A... his 'keep shipping' mantra is spot on.

items.rationale: Hailed Filecoin's FVM launch as advancing decentralized storage/compute capabilities.
items.age_note: Single statement 2023-03-14, never restated; ~6 months old as of analysis date.

citations.quote: a tremendous step forward in advancing the capabilities of decentralized storage and compute

items.rationale: Considers getting decentralized governance right early to be important and hard — a key build-time concern he flags positively.

citations.quote: getting decentralized governance right from the get go is important & hard.

items.rationale: Repeatedly describes the quality, creativity and drive of crypto founders as 'incredible' and 'infectious'; reorganized his role around mentoring them.
items.age_note: Consistent theme April–September 2023; most recent CSS push 2023-09-19/28.

citations.quote: The quality and creativity of entrepreneurs building the next generation of startups on top of crypto networks is incredible.
The energy, creativity, and drive of entrepreneurs building in crypto is infectious.

items.rationale: Believes the UK is on a path to becoming a leader in crypto regulation, a reason a16z is opening a London office and moving CSS there.

citations.quote: we believe the UK is on a path to becoming a leader in crypto regulation.

items.rationale: Surfaces SEC v. Ripple and the need to parse rulings, implying regulatory ambiguity is a live issue — though he frames it neutrally, not alarmingly, and contrasts it with UK optimism.
items.age_note: Inferred from 2023-07-16 sharing of SEC v Ripple analysis and 2023-09-19 contrast favoring UK regulation; never stated as a personal worry.

citations.quote: Trying to understand the nuances of this week's SEC v Ripple ruling?

items.rationale: Praised the FVM launch as a major capability step for the Filecoin network.
items.age_note: Single 2023-03-14 mention, ~6 months old, never restated.

citations.quote: Congratulations to... the entire @Filecoin community on today's launch of #FVM.

risk_regime.rationale: Joined a16z crypto during the 2023 bear market and consistently expresses aggressive builder optimism ('LFG!!'), drawing explicit parallels between crypto now and the early Internet at Netscape; no defensive or cautious market commentary appears anywhere in the corpus.

notes: Rosenthal is an operating partner, not an investor, so ~85% of his corpus is generic CEO/management coaching (1-1s, board mgmt, hiring/firing, pricing, biz dev) with no market signal; market views were extracted from his reactions to specific portfolio/ecosystem milestones. His signal is almost entirely on the excited side — he expresses essentially no concerns about crypto sectors or tokens, consistent with a thesis-driven a16z builder posture during a down market. 'Tokens' are sparse because he praises companies/projects (Yuga, Sound.xyz, Proof of Play, Matter Labs/zkSync) rather than liquid tokens; only Filecoin maps cleanly to a token. The crypto×AI and ZK/SNARK themes are his most-repeated and most-recent technical convictions. Recency note: nothing in the corpus shows a reversed stance — all views are either consistent over time or stated once and persisted.
